name: chatapp
description: Enterprise internal chat — root scripts for backend, desktop, and admin

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix desktop && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.setup: npm run setup:env && npm run install:all
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,desktop -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,desktop,admin -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:desktop && npm run lint:admin
